TestCase z43Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n2 > 0) {
        double* follow_case_b = (double*)malloc(t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
        memcpy(follow_case_b, t1.b, t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
        follow_case.b = follow_case_b;
    } else {
        follow_case.b = t1.b;
    }
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n2 < 2
    if (follow_case.n2 < 2) {
        // Less than 2 elements, cannot sort descending, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    // Simple bubble sort descending
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n2 - 1; i++) {
        for (int j = 0; j < follow_case.n2 - i - 1; j++) {
            if (follow_case.b[j] < follow_case.b[j + 1]) {
                double temp = follow_case.b[j];
                follow_case.b[j] = follow_case.b[j + 1];
                follow_case.b[j + 1] = temp;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
